description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from wrangler is all set to pump up your style. Pair it with classy formals or jeans and semi-formal shirts. Length: 108 cm Width: 3.8 cm Made of pure leather with a check finish Buckle with holes and a fixed loop to customise Fit Stitch detailing on either ends of the belt for style Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
